com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists

Class PBoolList

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList<A,W>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveList<PBoolArray,PBoolWriter>
          • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.lists.PBoolList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PBoolList
extends AbstractPrimitiveList<PBoolArray,PBoolWriter>
    A growable native bool list over a bit-packed array.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PBoolList()
      Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.
      PBoolList(long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
      PBoolList(NativeAllocator allocator, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(boolean value)
      Appends value, growing if needed.
      void addAll(boolean... values)
      Appends values left to right in one capacity reservation.
      boolean get(long index)
      Reads the element at index.
      long popCount()
      Counts true elements.
      long popCount(long fromIndex, long toIndex)
      Counts true elements from fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
      boolean removeLast()
      Removes and returns the last element.
      boolean set(long index, boolean value)
      Replaces the element at index.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeList

        clear, ensureCapacity, trimToSize

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PBoolList

        public PBoolList()
        Creates an empty list with zero capacity on the system allocator.

      • PBoolList

        public PBoolList(long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

      • PBoolList

        public PBoolList(NativeAllocator allocator,
                 long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty list with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public void add(boolean value)
        Appends value, growing if needed.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to append
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addAll

        public void addAll(boolean... values)
        Appends values left to right in one capacity reservation.
        Parameters:
        values - the values to append
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if values is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • get

        public boolean get(long index)
        Reads the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        Returns:
        the element
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • set

        public boolean set(long index,
                   boolean value)
        Replaces the element at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the element index
        value - the new value
        Returns:
        the previous value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • removeLast

        public boolean removeLast()
        Removes and returns the last element.
        Returns:
        the removed element
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • popCount

        public long popCount()
        Counts true elements.
        Returns:
        the number of true elements
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • popCount

        public long popCount(long fromIndex,
                     long toIndex)
        Counts true elements from fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive
        Returns:
        the number of true elements in the range
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
